description: Claude Code-parity hooks, dynamic user skill loading, and hex command execution for hex chat

specs.description: Session start hook fires when hex chat begins
specs.given: A project directory with hex hooks configured
specs.when: hex chat launches and the TUI enters its event loop
specs.then: hex hook session-start is spawned, its stdout output appears as a Skill message in the TUI

specs.description: Session end hook fires on quit
specs.when: The user presses q or Ctrl+C to quit
specs.then: hex hook session-end is spawned before the TUI tears down; session is auto-saved

specs.description: Route hook fires before each user message is sent to inference
specs.given: An active hex chat session with inbox notifications pending
specs.then: hex hook route runs; any priority-2 inbox notifications are surfaced as a Skill message above the user turn and inference is held until acknowledged

specs.description: User skills from .claude/skills/*.md are available as slash commands
specs.when: The user types /my-skill in hex chat
specs.then: The skill markdown body is injected as a user message and inference is triggered

specs.given: A project with skills in .claude/skills/ and global ~/.claude/skills/
specs.then: A Skill message is shown listing all available skill names with their first-line description

specs.description: /hex <subcommand> executes a hex CLI command and streams output into the TUI
specs.given: hex chat is running and hex binary is on PATH
specs.then: hex plan list is executed, output lines are streamed as a Skill message in real time

specs.description: hex_exec tool allows the model to run hex subcommands
specs.given: The model is connected to MCP tools including hex_exec
specs.when: The model invokes hex_exec with {"subcommand": "plan list"}
specs.then: hex plan list is executed via hex-nexus /api/exec and the output is returned as the tool result

specs.description: Skills from both global and project directories are merged; project overrides global
specs.given: ~/.claude/skills/my-skill.md and .claude/skills/my-skill.md both exist with different content

specs.description: Hook failure does not crash the chat session
specs.then: The hook exit code is shown as a dim Skill message but the TUI starts normally

specs.description: Unknown slash command gives helpful error, not crash
specs.then: A Skill message shows: unknown command '/foo' — try /skills to list available commands

specs.description: hex_exec tool only runs hex subcommands, not arbitrary shell
specs.given: Model attempts hex_exec with {"subcommand": "plan list; rm -rf /"}
specs.then: The subcommand string is argv-split and passed to the hex binary directly — no shell interpolation; the semicolon is treated as a literal argument and rejected by clap
specs.when: hex_exec is invoked with shell metacharacters in the subcommand

domain_conventions.security: Use tokio::process::Command with explicit arg list, never sh -c

specs.description: Status bar shows hook/inbox notification count when non-zero
specs.when: The user submits a message and route hook runs
specs.then: The status bar shows a notification badge until all priority-2 items are acknowledged
